headline: ISRG vs. ZBH: Which Robotic Surgery Stock Offers Better Upside Now?
summary: ISRG stands out over ZBH as stronger revenue growth, rising procedure demand, and expanding AI-driven innovation support better upside in 2026.

headline: Deutsche Bank Maintains a Sell Rating on Intuitive Surgical (ISRG), Here’s Why
summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) is one of the top high-conviction stocks to buy according to hedge funds. Deutsche Bank cut the price target on Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ:ISRG) to $366 from $440 on June 2 while maintaining a Sell rating on the shares. The stock also received a rating update from BofA on May 12, […]

headline: Goldman Sachs Intuitive Surgical call goes against the grain
summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) has been one of the year’s most punished large-cap healthcare names. The maker of the da Vinci surgical robot has watched its stock fall about 28% in 2026, even as revenue keeps climbing. Analysts have piled on. Deutsche Bank slashed its target.
